articles.author: Scott Nover, Mustafa Salim
articles.title: American journalist Shelly Kittleson kidnapped in Baghdad - The Washington Post
articles.description: Iraq’s interior ministry said it had arrested one suspect, seized a car and was looking for accomplices.
articles.content:
An American journalist has been kidnapped in Baghdad, U.S. and Iraqi authorities said Tuesday.
The journalist, identified as Shelly Kittleson by outlets for which she has written, has reported exten… [+165 chars]

articles.title: 'American Idol' postpones elimination after shocking public vote: 'First time it's ever happened' - Entertainment Weekly
articles.description: 'American Idol' has postponed its latest elimination after a shocking development with the public vote. 'This is the first time it's ever happened,' host Ryan Seacrest revealed to the stunned judges.
articles.content:
American Idol has run into a shocking delay over its latest public vote, with the reality competition series even postponing a contestant's elimination as a result.
